top3.sql:
SELECT 
    s.School,
    sa.AvgScrWrite,
    s.Phone
FROM 
    schools s
LEFT JOIN 
    satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE 
    s.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' 
    OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01';

SELECT 
    s.School,
    sa.AvgScrWrite,
    s.Phone
FROM 
    schools s
LEFT JOIN 
    satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE 
    s.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' 
    OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01';

SELECT 
    s.School,
    sa.AvgScrWrite,
    s.Phone
FROM 
    schools s
LEFT JOIN 
    satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE 
    CAST(SUBSTR(s.OpenDate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) > 1991 
    OR (s.ClosedDate IS NOT NULL AND CAST(SUBSTR(s.ClosedDate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) < 2000);

SELECT 
    s.School,
    sa.AvgScrWrite,
    s.Phone
FROM 
    schools s
LEFT JOIN 
    satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE 
    s.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' 
    OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01';

SELECT 
    s.School,
    sa.AvgScrWrite,
    s.Phone
FROM 
    schools s
LEFT JOIN 
    satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE 
    CAST(SUBSTR(s.OpenDate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) > 1991 
    OR (s.ClosedDate IS NOT NULL AND CAST(SUBSTR(s.ClosedDate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) < 2000);

SELECT 
    s.School,
    sa.AvgScrWrite,
    s.Phone
FROM 
    schools s
LEFT JOIN 
    satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE 
    CAST(strftime('%Y', s.OpenDate) AS INTEGER) > 1991 
    OR (s.ClosedDate IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%Y', s.ClosedDate) AS INTEGER) < 2000);

final.sql:
SELECT 
    s.School,
    sa.AvgScrWrite,
    s.Phone
FROM 
    schools s
LEFT JOIN 
    satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE 
    s.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' 
    OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01';
